thread.title: Muhyiddin is PN’s poster boy, our PM candidate, says Gerakan
thread.title_full: Muhyiddin is PN’s poster boy, our PM candidate, says Gerakan

title: Muhyiddin is PN’s poster boy, our PM candidate, says Gerakan
text:
Gerakan president Dominic Lau has made it clear that Perikatan Nasional chairperson Muhyiddin Yassin is the coalition's candidate for the prime minister post.
He pointed out that the former premier has the experience, leadership qualities and support of the coalition.
He pointed out that the former premier has the experience, leadership qualities and support of the coalition.
